title: hedysarum humile var. minus
intro: Hedysarum humile var. minus, also known as the dwarf hedysarum or low hedysarum, is a perennial plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedysarum humile var. minus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
